info.DAtuviSezaH: sidDAntakOmudyAm asya DAtoH 'pata gatO vA' iti nirdeSaM kftvA 'vA RijantaH vA adantaH ityeke' iti 'vA'Sabdasya spazwIkaraRadvayaM nirdizwam asti
info.english_meaning: to fall down to go down to descend to go
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: adantaH  ' gatyarTe patayet patet ' (Slo. 95) iti devaH
